output.inferred_need: Confidence to act on a repeat pass — often comparison or timing
output.message_angle: Acknowledge the return — reduce uncertainty with proof or a tailored nudge
output.offer_type: Reminder of value, social proof, limited-time incentive, or easy re-engagement path
output.surface: Banner, inline strip, or light modal on return
output.timing: Early in the return session after orientation
output.recommended_activation_summary: Return visitor with no CTA clicks — try proof-led messaging, a small incentive, or a one-click path back to the most relevant offer they viewed before.
